sensors.description: Long-range area surveillance radar

sensors.description: EL/M-2084 Iron Dome fire-control radar, 360° coverage, 100km range, simultaneous search and track

sensors.description: EL/M-2080 Green Pine phased-array radar for Arrow system, 120° sector, 500km range, ballistic missile detection and tracking

sensors.description: EL/M-2288 AD-STAR medium-range 3D surveillance radar, 360° coverage, 250km range

sensors.description: AN/TPS-80 G/ATOR multi-role ground/air radar, 360° coverage, 200km range

sensors.description: SPYDER MR short-range acquisition radar, 360° coverage, 80km range

sensors.description: TopLite III multi-spectral turret, gimbal-mounted, 30km range, 3° FOV, CCD/FLIR/laser

sensors.description: Litening pod adapted for ground mount, gimbal, 40km range, 2.5° FOV, laser designator capable

sensors.description: SkyGuard staring infrared array, 25km range, 20° wide FOV, persistent 360° surveillance

sensors.name: MWIR Staring Sensor (20°×90°)
sensors.description: Fixed MWIR staring sensor, 20°H×90°V FOV, 24 Hz, 1 Mpixel, default -3° below horizon (overridable)

sensors.name: MWIR 360° Quad-Head Staring

eoParams.configuration: 4× 20°×90° heads on single mast, 360° azimuth coverage

sensors.description: 360° staring array: 4× MWIR heads (each 20°H×90°V) on single mast, 24 Hz, 1 Mpixel per head, -3° below horizon (overridable)

sensors.name: Phased Array 45° Staring Radar
sensors.description: Fixed phased-array staring radar, 45°H × 90°V sector, 120km range. No mechanical rotation — electronic beam steering only. Azimuth orientation overridable at deployment.

sensors.name: 360° Quad-Panel Phased Array

radarParams.configuration: 4× 45°×90° phased-array panels on single mast, 360° azimuth coverage

sensors.description: 360° staring radar: 4× phased-array panels (each 45°H × 90°V) on single mast, 120km range. No mechanical rotation — full hemisphere electronic scan. Panel orientation overridable.

sensors.name: MWIR Staring Sensor (45°×45°)
sensors.description: Fixed MWIR staring sensor, 45°H×45°V FOV, 24 Hz, 1 Mpixel, 0° horizon setting (overridable)
